meta.name: multi-agent-governance-demo
meta.description: Decision corpus for the multi-actor governance walkthrough. Three actors will touch the same Python service against this shared invariant set. The constraints are deliberately dependency-specific so the enforcer fires on real violations, not on benign vocabulary.

decisions.decision: JSON storage only -- no external database.
decisions.rationale: The service runs on edge hardware where shipping a separate database is operationally unacceptable. Persistence stays in-process.

decisions.decision: No ORM in v1. Direct module access against the JSON store.
decisions.rationale: An ORM is operational complexity v1 does not justify. Direct module access keeps the storage abstraction one function-call wide.
